prompt: A cinematic, high-quality advertisement poster featuring two older Asian men sitting at a rustic wooden table in a warmly lit, moody environment. The man on the left has grey hair and a mustache, smiling enthusiastically, holding one glass of dark soda with a Pepsi logo. The man on the right has short hair and round glasses, looking forward with a subtle smile, holding one glass of dark soda with a Coca-Cola logo. Between them is one large, steaming dark ceramic pot filled with {argument name="dish description" default="braised green beans and pork belly"}. On the table in the front left is one blue Pepsi can, and on the front right is one red Coca-Cola can. The poster features elegant, bold Chinese typography. At the top, a collaboration logo of Pepsi and Coca-Cola sits above the main headline {argument name="main headline" default="炖豆角 可乐"}. Vertical text on the left reads {argument name="left character text" default="赵本山 饰 马大帅 倾情代言"}. Vertical text on the right reads {argument name="right character text" default="范伟 饰 彪哥 倾情代言"}. At the bottom center, an ornate badge contains the tagline {argument name="bottom tagline" default="东北硬菜 遇见经典"}, with smaller fine print below it. The lighting is dramatic, highlighting the steam rising from the food and the condensation on the cold drinks.
translatedPrompt: 一张电影感十足的高质量广告海报，画面中两位年长的亚洲男性坐在质朴的木桌旁，环境光影氛围浓郁且温暖。左侧男子留着灰白头发和胡须，正热情地微笑着，手中拿着一杯带有 Pepsi 标志的深色汽水。右侧男子留着短发，戴着圆框眼镜，神情淡定地看向前方，手中拿着一杯带有 Coca-Cola 标志的深色汽水。两人中间放着一个巨大的、热气腾腾的深色陶锅，里面盛着 {argument name="dish description" default="炖豆角配五花肉"}。桌子左前方放着一罐蓝色 Pepsi，右前方放着一罐红色 Coca-Cola。海报采用了优雅且醒目的中文字体。顶部是 Pepsi 与 Coca-Cola 的联名标志，下方是主标题 {argument name="main headline" default="炖豆角 可乐"}。左侧竖排文字为 {argument name="left character text" default="赵本山 饰 马大帅 倾情代言"}。右侧竖排文字为 {argument name="right character text" default="范伟 饰 彪哥 倾情代言"}。底部中央的精美徽章内印有标语 {argument name="bottom tagline" default="东北硬菜 遇见经典"}，下方配有较小的说明文字。灯光效果极具戏剧性，突显了食物升腾的热气以及冷饮杯壁上的水珠。

breakdown.creativeCore: 电影感餐饮联名海报：生成一张极具戏剧张力的高质量广告海报，展示两位角色共同用餐及竞争饮料品牌，并配有可自定义的排版设计。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
